# Impression Originale

> Luxury gift wrap, ribbons, boxes, bags, tags and hand-tied bows — hand-drawn by independent artists and made in France from recycled materials. Eco-conscious luxury gifting. Bilingual store (English / French), distributed internationally.

## Products
- [Luxury Gift Wrapping Paper](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/wrap/): Hand-drawn luxury gift wrapping paper, printed in France on recycled stock; sheets and sets.
- [Gift Ribbons](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/ribbons/): Couture gift ribbon in satin, velvet, organza, grosgrain and taffeta.
- [Handmade Bows](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bows/): Ready-tied handmade bows in sizes S, M and L.
- [Luxury Gift Boxes](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bags-boxes/): Artist-designed gift boxes in a range of sizes, made in France.
- [Easy-to-Build Gift Boxes](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bags-boxes/gift-boxes/): Drawer gift boxes that ship flat and assemble in three steps.
- [Gift Bags & Pouches](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/gift-bags/): Hand-finished luxury gift bags and pouches.
- [Gift Tags](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/gift-tags/): Illustrated designer gift tags on recycled card.
- [Furoshiki Fabric Wrap](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/gift-fabric-furoshiki/): Reusable fabric gift wrap for zero-waste gifting.

## Occasions
- [Christmas Gift Wrap](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/occasions-to-gift/christmas/)
- [Wedding Gift Wrap & Favours](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/occasions-to-gift/wedding-celebration/)
- [Birthday Gift Wrap](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/occasions-to-gift/birthday-party/)

## About
- [Our References](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/our-references/): Selected client references and gift-wrapping projects by Impression Originale.
- [Our Designers](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/our-designers/): The collective of artists behind the collections.
- [Bespoke & Corporate Gifting](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bespoke-services/): Custom and corporate gift-wrapping projects.
- [Masterclasses & Tutorials](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/know-how-the-perfect-gift/tutorials-gift-wraps-do-it-yourself/): Gift-wrapping and bow-tying how-to.
